jd.title: Project Manager - Pre Conditioned Air

requirements.text:
experience in project management in a manufacturing environment
In this role you will:
Establish Milestones and coordinate with operations and supply chain timely progress of Pre Conditioned Air builds
knowledge of sheet metal and refrigeration to create optimized operation sequenceTrack daily and hourly progress of build as needed

responsibilities: The ideal candidate will have experience in:Production and manufacturing or design of AC systemsManufacturing systems.Project management in manufacturing environmentSupply chain
jd.full_description:
As the Project Manager you will have experience in project management in a manufacturing environment
In this role you will:
Establish Milestones and coordinate with operations and supply chain timely progress of Pre Conditioned Air builds.Coordinate and conduct real time trouble shooting in consultation with engineeringOwn Pre Conditioned Air projects from beginning to end.Follow up with procurement on material shortagesOversee build progress, including coordination of in process inspection, and testingGuide operation teams on tactical details of execution, including training on work centersCoordinate with planning to ensure are milestones of the product build are being followedUtilize the knowledge of sheet metal and refrigeration to create optimized operation sequenceTrack daily and hourly progress of build as needed, resolve and remove obstacles and report progress to the plant manager.Utilize refrigeration systems knowledge to train people on AC unit build concepts.
The ideal candidate will have experience in:Production and manufacturing or design of AC systemsManufacturing systems.Project management in manufacturing environmentSupply chain
